threats.description: ShadowLeak (patched Sep 2025) and ZombieAgent (disclosed Jan 2026) by Radware: indirect prompt injection attacks on ChatGPT Deep Research component. Malicious instructions in Gmail/Outlook/Google Drive/GitHub content caused ChatGPT to exfiltrate passwords and modify persistent memory. ZombieAgent variant uses file-shared memory-modification instructions for persistent data leakage across sessions.
